commentaries.author: Clement Of Rome
commentaries.content: But if we do not the will of the Lord, we shall be of the scripture that saith, "My house was made a den of robbers."

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Not to the Jews only, but to all nations; not in Jerusalem only, but in every city of the known world. It is no longer a temple of bulls, goats, and rams, but a temple of prayer. (Ven. Bede)

commentaries.author: Tertullian of Carthage
commentaries.content: She has none to whom to make such a promise; and if she have had, she does not make it; since even the earthly temple of God can sooner have been called by the Lord a "den of robbers"
